goal: Review another AI's claim about card-codex artwork completion, verify the actual filesystem and rendering state, and report what is truly complete versus still missing.
constraints: Do not modify runtime code in this task; this is a review-only task.
Verify claims against actual files and current code, not the AI summary.
Prioritize factual verification of missing artwork files and current fallback behavior.
deliverables: A concise code-review style report on which artwork claims are true, false, or incomplete.
